title: Can anyone help with translation
wikitext:
[]: Can anyone help with translation?             Quote Post by AvatarHelper » Thu Aug 18, 2011 12:25 am At the end of episode 26' you may see some text, just after dark screen with the word "End". SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Thu Aug 18, 2011 1:51 am I'm afraid it's just a copyright notice! It tells you that the program is for private viewing and not to be reproduced, screened or broadcast without permission.

[]:             Quote Post by AvatarHelper » Thu Aug 18, 2011 2:23 am Thank you for the quick response.

Article: Can anyone help with translation
[]: Can anyone help with translation?             Quote Post by AvatarHelper » Thu Aug 18, 2011 12:25 am At the end of episode 26' you may see some text, just after dark screen with the word "End". SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Thu Aug 18, 2011 1:51 am I'm afraid it's just a copyright notice! It tells you that the program is for private viewing and not to be reproduced, screened or broadcast without permission.

[]:             Quote Post by AvatarHelper » Thu Aug 18, 2011 2:23 am Thank you for the quick response.
